PETITION FOR AUTHORITY TO SELL REAL PROPERTY AND YO ENTER INTO EXCLUSIVE RIGHT TO SELL REAL PROPERTY AGREEMENT. CONTINUED FROM FEB-06-2006 TO MAY-08-2006 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 204 COURT: THE ADMINISTRATOR TO GET ESTIMATES FOR REPAIR TO PUT PROPERTY IN CONDITION TO RENT. SHE IS AUTHORIZED TO GET AN EQUITY LOAN ON THE BEST TERMS AVAILABLE. MS. LI IS TO VACATE THE PROPERTY BY 5/8/06. SHE IS ALSO TO ALLOW INSPECTION BY CONTRACTORS TO GIVE BIDS FOR REPAIR. IF SHE DOES NOT VACATE BY 5/8, COURT WILL CONSIDER THE PETITION TO SELL THE PROPERTY. MS. LI MAY OFFER TO POST A BOND TO COVER ALL LOSS TO THE ESTATE. COURT WILL CONSIDER BOND IN LIEU OF SALE. PER COURT
